description_en: Edmonton may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 40 halal restaurants and 27 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Edmonton, Canada, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Edmonton: 40+ halal restaurants, 27 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
